title: 7 day work week on Workload view
excerpt: Please create the option to have a 7 day work week under the workload view. We have 24/7 operations and the limitation to work load planning over 5 work days limits the use of this feature.

posts.author: oakleymartin (Martin Oakley)
posts.cookedHtml: Please create the option to have a 7 day work week under the workload view. We have 24/7 operations and the limitation to work load planning over 5 work days limits the use of this feature.

posts.author: Danielle-monday.com (Danielle Glickman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everybody!

Danielle here from the monday.com team


We are working on an exciting new feature that allows you to manage availability on the account and we are looking for accounts to join our beta group! The feature includes:


1) Adding Work Schedules in ‘Admin’:

The ability to define multiple account-level work schedules for different users. Work schedule includes the ability to customize the following for different users:

  • Working hours per day
  • Working days/ Weekends
  • Holidays or other non-working days

2) Visibility of work schedules in workload:

Displaying holidays/weekends of different users in workload + calculating user capacity based on work schedule

image2176×1296 238 KB


If you want to join the beta group please sign up in this form: WorkForms

posts.author: avp (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Danielle-monday.com This is great and much needed! My preliminary feedback upon trying work schedules is that we need Holidays to reflect when showing the workload by Week or Month view. We usually work with the workload displayed by Week and under the work schedules beta we cannot see when there is “less” availability in a week due to a holiday, until we have put a booking on someone. Even then it is very subtle and you need to notice that the “of XX” effort is lower than typical. Additionally, we need an API for this to mass upload holidays for each country. Setting 1 or 2 by hand is fine, but manually setting holidays for 20+ countries is tedious for an admin.

As a point of reference, we currently manage Holidays as a distinct board with items for each holiday in a country assigned to each employee, which allows us to see holidays in the workload view.

posts.author: RichardT (Richard )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

The option to be able to assign different schedules to individual users (not just teams ) is important to us. We have people working different time zones and others who don’t necessarily work 5 days a week.

I have requested access to the beta trial a few times but don’t believe this has been enabled in our instance.

Is there an ETA for when this may be fully released?

Thanks
